name: Supino's
teaser: The best New York style in Detroit. Super cool interior in a great location. For locals, not tourists.
review: It's the best New York style in Detroit and I would be there all the time if I lived there. And it's a super cool interior in a great location. But this is for locals, not tourists.
headsUp: For locals, not tourists. A neighborhood treasure.
update: Still the best NY-style in Detroit. The Eastern Market location is great.
